dataset: LibreHealth EHR with NHANES real patient data

pi_items.source: Task description (line 5), verifier.py (line 53), setup_task.sh (line 19) - all consistently reference 'Staff Meeting' as the event title
Task description (line 5) explicitly states '4:00 PM (16:00) slot'; verifier.py lines 64 and 73 check start_time.startswith('16:00'); export_result.sh line 30 queries for pc_startTime LIKE '16:%'
Task description requires '60 minutes' duration; mathematical conversion: 60 minutes × 60 seconds/minute = 3600 seconds; verifier.py line 81 checks duration == '3600'
Task description (line 5) explicitly states 'duration of 60 minutes'; metadata claim is internally consistent with event_duration_sec (3600 seconds ÷ 60 = 60 minutes)

Task description (line 5) explicitly requires 'create a Non-Patient event (Provider Event)' and 'Do not assign a patient to this event'; verifier.py lines 88-95 validates that pc_pid is 0, 'NULL', 'None', or '' for non-patient events

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a calendar event in LibreHealth EHR (open-source electronic health records software). The event must be titled 'Staff Meeting', scheduled for 16:00 (4:00 PM), with a duration of 60 minutes (3600 seconds), and must be created as a non-patient/provider event with no patient assignment. All metadata claims are consistent with the task description and verifier logic. The underlying database uses real NHANES patient data (9,375 real patients from the CDC's National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey), but the calendar event itself is synthetic and created by the agent during task execution.
